label: Market Definition
definition: Aberdeen defines a market category or concept

label: Competitive Assessment
definition: Aberdeen's assessment of a named competitor or competitive product

label: Product Feature
definition: A specific capability or technical feature of a named product

label: Market Finding
definition: An empirical or analytical finding about the market

label: Analyst Recommendation
definition: A strategic recommendation from Aberdeen to enterprise buyers

label: Technology Landscape
definition: Characterization of the broader technology environment

label: Analyst Assessment
definition: Aberdeen's evaluative judgment about a vendor or product

label: Product Context
definition: Contextual details about a product's positioning or presence

label: Organization
definition: A company, consortium, or standards body

label: Primary Vendor
definition: The vendor whose product is the subject of the study

label: Research Author
definition: The organization that authored the study

label: Competitor Referenced
definition: A competitor referenced for comparison

label: Technology Partner
definition: A vendor whose technology the primary product integrates with

label: Planned Technology Partner
definition: Integration planned but not yet available at time of study

label: Future Acquirer
definition: Entity that later acquired the primary vendor

label: Platform Vendor Referenced
definition: Vendor whose platform is mentioned as supported

label: Active
definition: Entity operating independently as of the study date

label: Acquired
definition: Entity was acquired by another organization after the study

label: Rebranded
definition: Entity underwent a name/brand change

label: Obsolete
definition: Product/technology discontinued, no active maintenance

label: Evolved
definition: Technology transformed into or replaced by a named successor

label: Active
definition: Technology still in mainstream active use as of 2026

label: Superseded
definition: Technology replaced by alternative approaches; original largely unused

label: Active (Niche)
definition: Technology still actively used but in niche or legacy contexts

label: Product Profile
definition: In-depth evaluation of a specific vendor product

label: Groupware & Workflow
definition: Collaborative software, workflow automation, and enterprise groupware

label: Industry Analysis
definition: Analysis of market dynamics and industry trends

label: Competitive Profiling
definition: Structured comparison of competing products or vendors

label: Field Research
definition: Primary research with enterprise customers or end-users

label: Actual Outcome
definition: Verified post-publication outcome for a prior prediction

label: Expert Opinion
definition: Analyst assessment, recommendation, or expert judgment

label: Market Data
definition: Market size, growth, competitive position, or financial metric

label: Technology Assessment
definition: Evaluation of a technology's capabilities, features, or specifications

label: Viability Prediction
definition: Forward-looking prediction about technology or market trajectory

label: Document Review
definition: Analysis of published documents, product specs, and archival materials

label: Industry Analysis
definition: Analyst assessment and industry-level analysis based on market knowledge
